_metadata.description: Simulated cross-system access evidence for Q1 2026 audit. All data is fabricated.

findings._finding_description: Bucket policy allows anonymous public read; policy was set via vendor.acme session.
User granted PowerUserAccess without MFA enforcement; external exposure via self-managed access keys.

CardSystem.notes: Retained from previous role (Cards, ended 2025-11-30). Should have been revoked on transfer.

BankSystem.notes: EXCESSIVE — marketing role does not need Bank Ops Admin. Provisioned through short-project that ended 2024.

ContractSystem.notes: EXCESSIVE — never used; appears to be over-provisioning.

CardSystem.notes: EXCESSIVE — never used by this user.

GitHub.notes: EXCESSIVE — vendor should only have Read; likely mis-provisioning.

AWS.notes: MFA missing; external consultant identity. Scope check recommended.

HRSystem.notes: EXCESSIVE — external vendor should never have HR access. Provisioned by mistake during team-wide grant.

LoanSystem.notes: Retained from previous role (Loans, ended 2025-12-15). Should have been revoked on transfer.

campaigns.description: Quarterly access recertification for period Oct-Dec 2025
Quarterly access recertification for period Jan-Mar 2026

reviews.notes: Manager certified all systems including CardSystem admin — DID NOT flag stale access from prior Cards role. Review quality gap.
Exception logged but remediation slipped past due date.
Review was never completed before campaign closed. Manager did not submit attestation.
Manager certified Bank/Card/Contract access WITHOUT questioning — review quality concern; user is Marketing role but certified for business-app admin access.
External contractors excluded from automated review queue; manager was never notified. Control gap.
Exception filed for stale LoanSystem access; remediation not completed.
